arts.ttl: 'He knows I'm good enough' - Manchester United have a new midfield pecking order
arts.sum: Toby Collyer made his first European start for Man United as they beat Rangers 2-1 in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Friday briefing: Fernandes gives Man Utd win and Son brace sees Tottenham home
arts.sum: Manchester United left it late to snatch victory over Rangers in Europe, while a host of Premier League managers will face the media on Friday

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Second bid prepared for 'keen' target as Marcus Rashford accepts next step
arts.sum: Manchester United are expected to make progress this weekend as they look to bring in a new signing before the transfer window shuts while Marcus Rashford endures a difficult time

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United are enduring a roller-coaster season
arts.sum: Manchester United's dramatic 2-1 win over Rangers in the Europa League highlighted the ups and downs that head coach Ruben Amorim is dealing with.

arts.ttl: Man United 2-1 Rangers: Ruben Amorim emulates Sir Alex Ferguson and Sir Matt Busby's European feat thanks to late win
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim emulates club legends Sir Alex Ferguson and Sir Matt Busby following their 2-1 win over Rangers in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Toby Collyer embodies eternal issue at heart of Manchester United’s flux | Jonathan Liew
arts.sum: Youngster looks an assured player – but only when his team move away from becoming a novelty basketball side Finally, with a minute to go in regulation time, we got the game we came for. Rangers equalised late on and Manchester United put the ball back on the centre spot, and the Rangers fans roared and the United fans roared back, and the cold wind whipped in off the Pennines, and for a few blissful minutes Old Trafford was a whirlpool of pure blood cells. Finally the noise began to build and the tackles flew in and every duel felt epic. Alejandro Garnacho tried to burn James Tavernier for pace, and Tavernier – eyeballs popping, 33-year-old lungs bursting – somehow held him off. A few seconds later Nicolas Raskin flew through the air and cut down Kobbie Mainoo like a second-row at a lineout. Free-kick. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes late show brings much-needed relief for Ruben Amorim - as Man United boss admits 'it was a victory we truly needed'
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER AT OLD TRAFFORD: A 2-1 victory in the Battle of Britain tie lifted United into fourth place in the table and means a point next week should be enough to clinch a top-eight finish.

arts.ttl: Man United will launch investigation into how Rangers fans got tickets for home areas at Old Trafford and promise 'strongest possible sanctions'
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Over 3,500 Rangers supporters were officially inside the stadium but significantly more appeared to have been able to secure a seat in the home end.

arts.ttl: Three key questions for Rangers after Man Utd loss
arts.sum: Who plays in goals? Should Clement put faith in youth? And what about Cyriel Dessers' future? BBC Sport Scotland assesses three key issues for Rangers after late defeat by Man United.

arts.ttl: Every word: Ruben's post-Rangers press conference
arts.sum: "I think he is improving in every aspect in the game. He is improving the recovering position and until 90 minutes he is always there and helping.
